title: leontodon nudicaulis subsp. perennis
intro: Leontodon nudicaulis subsp. perennis, also known as perennial hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Leontodon nudicaulis subsp. perennis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
